kw.name: Setup Admin And Go To Logs
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: System Logs (บันทึกกิจกรรมระบบ)
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'System Logs (บันทึกกิจกรรมระบบ)'.
kw.arg: System Logs (บันทึกกิจกรรมระบบ)
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Setup Normal User And Go To Home
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[normalize-space()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: บัญชีของฉัน
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Dashboard'.
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[option[@value="VIEW_DATA"]]' by value VIEW_DATA.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'message: User logged in successfully'.

kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
